name: skill-flash
description: Company-OS super skill: an agent company in any repository — issue-first pipeline, departments, knowledge graph, agent hiring, rituals, token economy

interface.shortDescription: An agent company in any repository: pipeline, departments, hiring, rituals.
interface.longDescription: Deploys a full 'agent company' into any repository (including an empty one): repo bootstrap with GitHub Issues, self-sufficient specs in issue bodies, pointer dispatch to narrow department agents, fresh-context verification, use-case-driven agent hiring from a verified skill registry, consilium protocol for high-stakes decisions, living state docs, cross-project lessons, and strict token economy — the orchestrator thinks, cheap models work.
defaultPrompt: /skill-flash Цель: разверни компанию в этом репозитории
Разверни компанию и заведи первый эпик
